name: android-engineer
description: Senior Android engineer workflows — Kotlin-first (Java legacy supported), Jetpack Compose + View system, MVVM, Coroutines/Flow, Room, Retrofit, Hilt. Three-tier device orchestration: plugin tools first (device management, app lifecycle, logcat, crash/ANR reports, permissions, network, dark mode, Compose preview), mobile-mcp for UI interaction (element tree, taps, swipes, type), raw ADB shell as a last-resort fallback. Includes skills for implement, debug, build-fix, test, review, and an autonomous QA agent that runs on the emulator.
